families.currentNote: Patient, identifier, coverage, and VSD snapshot workflows are covered by unit-style integration tests.

Diagnosis lifecycle and persisted coding evaluations exist, and fixture-backed SDICD/SDKH/SDKRW coverage now checks rule outcomes plus package integrity, provenance metadata, byte-level sha256 verification, and signature or trust metadata through a shared local oracle. No executable package oracle exists yet.
Official .con fixtures from the XPM package are covered in automated cold-start and warm-cache tests, including positive and negative validator cases.

The full official Q3_2026 ERP XML archive runs through the real validator and now completes without error findings in the automated suite. A property-based compatibility test also checks that selected structural mutations to an official example are rejected by both the local FHIR oracle and the executable validator, but local-vs-executable parity is not yet complete for every structural expectation.
Official eAU examples validate via the executable FHIR path from an empty cache.
Official BMP example XMLs are covered through the downloaded KBV XSD package and example archive.
Local oracle checks now run official KBV Heilmittel Pruefpaket-derived fixtures for blanko handling, approvals, and quantity limits.

families.sourceQuarterOrVersion: Muster.zip / BFB docs as published on update.kbv.de
families.currentNote: Local BFB oracle coverage now validates deterministic golden template snapshots for field layout, required values, and barcode payload or placement semantics, anchored to the published KBV Blankoformulare assets on update.kbv.de. No full certified PDF renderer exists yet.
Immutability and issuance flows are tested through medication, eAU, and Heilmittel workflows.
Schema is present and repo tests now cover mailbox registration plus eEB receive, list, view, and adoption-gating flows, but broader production transport workflows remain largely unimplemented.

DiGA catalog import, canonical order finalization, immutable document issuance, and DeviceRequest-based eVDGA bundle rendering are covered by workflow tests. The shared FHIR oracle now validates the mirrored official eVDGA example archive against the official validator package, while emitted bundles also pass local schema-backed oracle checks.

Outbound VoS call-bundle publication, kID-bounded read/search projection, immutable artifact issuance, and inbound storage-bundle import into medication orders and medication plans are covered by workflow tests.

Public workflows now cover simulated and official-searchset TSS import, listing/filtering/selection, booking, referral consumption, and automatic billing-case plus encounter mapping. Pinned KBV response XML, VSD, and test-patient ZIP assets from update.kbv.de are exercised in the TSS tests.
Historical import and export architecture is modeled, but no validator or import implementation exists.
